description: A stylized screenshot of a Truth Social / X post by 'Donald J. Trump @realDonaldTrump' presented as a clean white card with black sans-serif body text. The avatar shows Trump's face stylized with an American flag overlay, accompanied by a magenta verified checkmark and a black '+' subscription badge. The post is a statement on the death of Ted Turner. Verbatim text: 'Ted Turner, one of the Greats of All Time, just died. He founded CNN, sold it, and was personally devastated by the Deal because the new ownership took CNN, his "baby," and destroyed it. It became woke, and everything that he is not all about. Maybe the new buyers, wonderful people, will be able to bring it back to its former credibility and glory. Regardless, however, one of the Greats of Broadcast History, and a friend of mine. Whenever I needed him, he was there, always willing to fight for a good cause! President DONALD J. TRUMP'. The messaging is an ostensible eulogy that doubles as a swipe at CNN's current ownership and 'woke' editorial direction. Propaganda technique: blending a personal tribute with media criticism. Target audience is the administration's supporters and the general public following presidential statements.
notable_text: Ted Turner, one of the Greats of All Time, just died. He founded CNN... It became woke, and everything that he is not all about... one of the Greats of Broadcast History, and a friend of mine.
